_info: Checkup — English strings. Do not change keys, only translate values.
_add_language: To add a new language: copy this file as Strings.fr.json and translate the values.
_newline: Line break in a value: use \n (e.g. in HelpText).
Menu_SavePreset: Save current rows to this preset
Tip_FormulaToggle: Show / edit the formula behind this value (fx)
CatBuilder_Dlg_UnsavedChanges:
There are unsaved changes.
Save before leaving?
Cap_TipExpertToggle: Toggle Expert Mode for this group
Cap_ExpertModeInfoStrip: ⚡ Expert Mode active — this capability reads live values from the main window
Msg_LogicCycleDetected: ⚠ Logical cycle detected in {0} group(s) ({1}). Resolution aborted to prevent crash. Please fix the target field.
Tip_BasicLogic_Value: VALUE({INPUT})  →  strips unit suffix, returns number
Tip_BasicLogic_Mid: MID({field.key}, 0, 3)  →  substring from start, length N
Tip_BasicLogic_IsEmpty: ISEMPTY({field.key})  →  true when empty or null
Tip_BasicLogic_Eq: EQ({field.key}, "value")  →  true when strings are equal
Tip_BasicLogic_Ne: NE({field.key}, "value")  →  true when strings are not equal
Tip_BasicLogic_And: AND({cond1}, {cond2}, …)  →  true when all conditions are true
Tip_BasicLogic_Or: OR({cond1}, {cond2}, …)  →  true when any condition is true
Tip_CatTokenSep: Characters between tokens in the field value (e.g. '-' → A-B-C)
Tip_CompanionCatTokenSep: Characters between tokens in the companion field (may differ from above)
Tip_CompanionField: Field that automatically receives a paired value when this card writes
Tip_CompanionOutSep: Characters between output tokens written to the companion field
Tip_LookupRole: Catalog column matched against each source token (usually PRI)
Tip_OutputRole: Catalog column whose value is written for each matched token (usually SEC)
Sort_Dlg_Partial:
The selection covers {0} of {1} rows.

Yes  = Sort selected rows only
No   = Sort all rows
Cancel = Abort
Msg_FormulaTargetUnresolved: The formula's target field could not be resolved (broken or circular logic chain).
Dlg_DemoWarning_Body:
You are running the add-in with the factory demo configuration.

The demo Logic groups write values directly to your document (Appearance, Material, Description, etc.). Test on a new blank file to avoid modifying real documents.

This reminder disappears once you save at least one preset with a new name and your own field layout.

Tip: right-click a preset button → Save Preset.
Info_Main_Intro: Select an object (IPT / IAM) → values refresh automatically on document or selection change.
Info_Main_Edit: Click a value → edit in-place → OK.
Info_Main_Formula: ƒx button → the value comes from an Inventor formula (iProperty expression or parameter equation); press ƒx to reveal and edit the equation behind it.
Info_Main_RightClick:
Right-click a value field → copy to clipboard.
Hover over a value field → full value as tooltip.
Info_Main_Preset: Right-click a preset button → save, import, or export the current layout.
Info_Main_Refresh: Available values refresh automatically on document switch, even when only an IPT or IDW is open.
Info_Main_Header:
Header shows the file name of the read document. With a multi-selection all names are listed (text in red). Repeated instances show a counter, e.g. Bolt_M8.ipt (6).
⇄ button on the left (or click the file name) cycles the display modes:
• Plain — name + count
• Compact — name + count + IAM count (e.g. 6, 2 IAM)
• Detailed — grouped by parent sub-assembly
The chosen mode is remembered across sessions. Hover shows the full text.
Info_Roles_None:
No special function.
Use for helper columns, internal keys, or free-text fields.
Info_Roles_PRI:
The short form of the entry (Field 1).
Written to e.g. SPEZIFIK 1.
Info_Roles_SEC:
The long form of the entry (Field 2).
Written to e.g. SPEZIFIK 2.
Info_Roles_TAB:
Tab identifier in the picker dialog:
Each unique value in this column creates a separate tab.
A comma-separated cell lists the row under several tabs at once (e.g. "A, B").
Info_Roles_GRP:
Sub-group header within a tab:
Entries sharing this value are grouped under a header inside the tab's list.
Info_Roles_SRT:
Item sort order:
Defines the order in which entries appear within a group.
Multiple columns → SRT1, SRT2, … (tiered / tiebreaker sort).
Info_Roles_GST:
Group sort order:
Defines the order in which groups appear within a tab.
Multiple columns → GST1, GST2, …
Info_Roles_TST:
Tab sort order:
Defines the order in which tabs appear in the picker.
Multiple columns → TST1, TST2, …
Info_Roles_AUX:
Helper data, e.g. tooltip text.
This column is not written to any field.
Info_Roles_RightClick:
Right-click any column header badge → Move Role Up / Down
(SRT1↔SRT2, GST1↔GST2, etc. when multiple columns share the same role type).
Info_Roles_ExampleColumns:
Tab      → TAB  (e.g. "P", "L", "F")
TabOrder → TST  (e.g. 1, 2, 3)
Group    → GRP  (e.g. "Profiles", "Tabs")
GrpOrder → GST  (e.g. 10, 20, 30)
SortNr   → SRT  (e.g. 10, 20, 30)
Spezific1 → PRI (e.g. "P-40x3")
Spezific2 → SEC (e.g. "Profile 40×3 mm")
Note     → AUX  (not included in output value)
Info_Roles_ExampleResult:
Tabs: [Profiles] [Tabs] [Flanges]  ← ordered by TST
In tab 'Profiles' → groups in GST order
Within each group → entries in SRT order
Click P-40x3 → writes PRI to SPEZIFIK 1, SEC to SPEZIFIK 2.
Info_Roles_SearchBody:
The Search Card shows a text input in the value row. As the user types, the list filters in real time.

Search Roles defines which catalog columns are matched. Enter comma-separated role badges:
  PRI          — short code only
  PRI,SEC      — short code + long description
  PRI,SEC,AUX  — + auxiliary/keyword column

When left empty → defaults to PRI and SEC.

Tip: Add an AUX column with synonyms → users can find entries by description without knowing the exact code.
Info_Cards_CatalogTabDesc:
Data tables displayed in the selection picker window. Each catalog contains any number of columns and rows.
New / ✎ / × → create, rename, or delete a catalog.
Import / Export → save or load a catalog as a JSON file.
Info_Cards_InlineBody:
Click a cell → edit directly.
Right-click a cell → context menu (copy, paste, insert or delete row/column, sort …).
Double-click column header → rename the label.
Right-click column header → change role rank.
Column role (combo box at bottom) → define which catalog value is written to which field.
ℹ button → explanation of all column roles.
Info_Cards_LogicTabDesc:
Each logic links fields in the main window to catalogs.
New / ✎ / × → create, rename, or delete a logic.
Import / Export → save or load a logic as a JSON file.
Info_Cards_Dropdown_Desc:
Selection field in the value field → pick an entry from a catalog. The PRI value is written to the target field.
SEC: secondary text in the dropdown. Display columns: extra columns in the picker.
Info_Cards_Sync_Desc: Links two fields for synchronized writing. A "Correct" button appears when the fields do not match.
Info_Cards_PairTransform_Desc: Splits the target field's value into tokens using a separator. Each token is looked up in the catalog (Lookup Role); the matching output value is written to a companion field. Enables multi-token display (green/red markers).
Info_Cards_Link_Desc: Connects this group to another row in the main window. Linked rows are always added, removed, and moved together.
Info_Cards_Button_Desc: Small button on the right side of the value field. Opens a picker window; the PRI value is applied to the target field.
Info_Cards_MultiPick_Desc:
Opens a picker window for selecting multiple catalog entries. Selected PRI values are joined with a separator and written to the target field. Companion field: SEC values are mapped to a second field in parallel. Enables multi-token display.
Note: Combine with a Button card to make the button visible; add a Pair Transform card for the text-edit path.
Info_Cards_Search_Desc:
Text input field in the value field with real-time catalog filtering.
Search roles: which columns are searched (e.g. PRI,SEC,AUX).
Info_Cards_PrefixSuffix_Desc:
Appends a fixed prefix and/or suffix to the target field value.
Before writing, any existing prefix/suffix is detected and stripped to avoid duplication.
Info_Cards_Sort_Desc:
Sorts the tokens in the target field alphabetically or by a catalog sort key.
Useful for keeping fields like material or prefix lists in a consistent order.
Info_Cards_BasicLogics_Desc:
Basic Logics add a pre-configured formula card to the active group.
Formula cards compute a value from a formula expression.
Reference field values: {PARAM:Width}, {IPROP|Material}, etc.
31 formula functions available (see full list below).
Target field: group default field or an explicit field key.

Pre-configured templates:
Info_Cards_GlobalActions_Desc:
▲ / ▼  Move group up / down
⧉      Duplicate the active group
×      Remove the active group
